who: logistics ops teams in e-commerce businesses processing 50–100 orders/week
offer: For logistics ops teams in e-commerce businesses processing 50–100 orders/week, ineffective inventory monitoring causes stockouts. We provide alerts for replenishment instead of manual tracking of inventory levels.
problem: Inability to monitor inventory levels effectively leads to stockouts.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for logistics ops teams
Indie Hackers posts and comments on workflows
DM outreach to logistics ops teams with demo video
Community forums where logistics ops teams share tools
try_it: Let users try weekly inventory alerts on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
